Good evening, Apple’s stock plunged Thursday after the tech giant announced price hikes for laptops and tablets to the tune of hundreds of dollars. Not long after, Xbox announced the price of its consoles would increase by at least $100—its second price hike in less than a year. Read more details about Apple’s and Xbox’s price hikes here. Thanks for reading! Matt Rasnic Associate Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Iran-Egypt World Cup ‘Pride Match’ Kicks Off Friday: Here’s What We Know The announcement comes despite Iran and Egypt both criminalizing homosexuality in their countries. Read more. AI Startups With No Revenue Are Using This Tactic To Supersize Their Valuations Funding rounds where VCs can invest at wildly different prices are helping AI founders raise unprecedented amounts of money at sky-high valuations, before they even have a product. Read more.

75081.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Ripple's RLUSD makes a splash in Japan
75081.body:
SBI Holdings agrees to acquire Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank in $288.6 million deal | TRM Labs says CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds; exchange denies wrongdoing | Coinbase-incubated Base suffers mainnet chain stall, interrupting block production | Pump.fun offers up to $5 million salary for chief legal officer role |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell & Kyle Baird

Presented by

Figure Markets ( https://figuremarkets.onelink.me/Plnq/theblocknewsletter?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! *Bitcoin* fell below $60,000 ahead of Friday's $10.6 billion options expiry, with analysts warning that persistent ETF outflows ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406112/waiting-for-buyers-bitcoin-holds-fragile-60k-floor-ahead-of-10-6b-quarterly-expiry?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) and a negative gamma setup leave the market vulnerable to another sharp move in either direction.

In today's newsletter, *Ripple* launches its *RLUSD* stablecoin in Japan, *SBI Holdings* agrees to a $288.6 million *Bitbank* acquisition deal, *TRM Labs* says *CoinEx* processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, and more.

Meanwhile, *Standard Chartered* said it sees "generational wealth" in a potential *Aave* recovery ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405996/standard-chartered-generational-wealth-potential-aave-recovery-predicts-50x-upside-2030?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) , predicting 50x upside by 2030.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out *The Starting Block* ( https://www.youtube.com/@theblockcrypto?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) : Catch an exclusive, in-person livestream interview with *Binance* founder *Changpeng "CZ" Zhao* as *The Block* launches its new daily live show on *X* and *YouTube* on June 29 at 8 a.m. ET.

*THE BIG ONE*

*🇯🇵 Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/406067/ripple-launches-rlusd-stablecoin-japan?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Ripple* has launched its *RLUSD* stablecoin in Japan after receiving regulatory approval.

* The dollar-pegged stablecoin is available to both institutional and retail users through *SBI VC Trade*.
* Japan's *Financial Services Agency* classified RLUSD as a new type of electronic payment instrument under the Payment Services Act.
* Ripple SVP *Jack McDonald* said RLUSD will serve as a global bridge for payments, tokenization, and collateral management.
* RLUSD launched in 2024, backed 1:1 by dollar deposits and short-term U.S. government bonds, and now holds a $1.6 billion market cap.
* The launch landed the same day *SBI* debuted its yen stablecoin, *JPYSC* , as Japan's three megab

Robert Guest

Deputy editor



 While waiting in Milan airport this week, I stood aside to let someone in a wheelchair roll past. Looking down, I saw that it was Rishi Sunak, Britain’s former prime minister, who injured his leg skiing a couple of months ago. The Italian lady next to me whispered: “Isn’t that whatsisname?”

75044.subject: Pozvánka na vstup do aplikácie SBA educa
75044.body: Dobrý deň, Na základe úhrady FA za odbornú skúšku, Vám zasielame prístup na vzdelávanie do aplikácie SBAeduca. Vzdelávanie je zadarmo a ponúkame Vám ho ako možnosť prípravy na skúšku. Pre prvé prihlásenie do aplikácie kliknite na nasledujúci link https://www.sbaeduca.sk/Prihlasenie?iduser=130088&code=Gjizezcx Po prihlásení zadajte nové heslo. Nové heslo musí obsahovať minimálne 8 znakov, pričom aspoň jedno z nich musí byť číslo. Pri prvom prihlásení ešte pred vytvorením nového hesla budete 2x vyzvaný na súhlas so spracovaním osobných údajov. Po zadaní hesla už tento link nebude fungovať. Prihlasovanie potom prebieha cez stránku www.sbaeduca.sk. Prihlasovacie meno je Vaša emailová adresa a heslo je to, ktoré ste si zvolili pri prvom prihlásení. Ak heslo zabudnete, na našej stránke v časti prihlásenie je možnosť poslať si nový prihlasovací link. ––––––––––––- Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. Ak nie je možné kliknúť na link, skopírujte ho do adresného riadku Vášho internetového prehliadača a stlačte ENTER. V prípade potreby kontaktujte: podpora@sbaeduca.sk ––––––––––––- Poznámka: Prosím neodpovedajte na tento e-mail. E-mail bol vygenerovaný automaticky.

75043.subject: Informácia o pridelení kurzu a aplikácii SBAeduca
75043.body: Dobrý deň, na základe úhrady zálohovej faktúry sme Vám v aplikácii SBAeduca pridelili kurz/y na vzdelávanie. Nájdete ho/ich po prihlásení na svoje užívateľské konto v časti Vzdelávanie/Moje kurzy. Prístupové údaje do aplikácie sa nezmenili. Tento email je zasielaný iba registrovaným užívateľom. Ak ste v aplikácii dlho neštudovali a medzičasom ste zabudli svoje prihlasovacie údaje stačí ísť na našu stránku www.sbaeduca.sk a v časti prihlásenie - zabudol som heslo si poslať link na nastavenie nového hesla. Váš login je: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. S pozdravom tím podpora SBAeduca

75042.subject: Daňový doklad OFV
75042.body: Dobrý deň, v prílohe Vám posielam daňový doklad. Ak u nás zatiaľ nemáte svoje užívateľské konto v ďalšom e-maile Vám pošleme link na vstup do aplikácie na vzdelávanie. S pozdravom Sandra Sidor 0902778271
